name.zh: NHK 广播科学研究实验室

description.en: Rectified linear activation traces through early neural vision work and later became a standard activation for deep networks. Its simple non-saturating shape helped train deeper models more effectively than many older squashing nonlinearities.
description.zh: 整流线性激活可以追溯到早期神经视觉研究，后来成为深度网络的标准激活函数。它简单且不易饱和的形状，比许多早期压缩型非线性函数更有利于训练深层模型。

subcaption.zh: 有影响力的整流函数分析共同作者。

subcaption.en: Original local explainer of the max(0, x) activation.
subcaption.zh: 关于 max(0, x) 激活函数的本地原创解释图。

license.en: Original local SVG redraw; source figures are not copied.
license.zh: 本地原创 SVG 重绘；未复制来源图形。

review.imagePolicy: Do not use new remote images in production until source and license are verified.
nextSteps: Open sources.json and pages/ to verify primary facts.
Record accepted/rejected image candidates in notes.md.
Move approved assets into resources/images only after review.
